articles.title: CVS Health, UnitedHealth Group stocks tumble on lower Medicare rate proposal
articles.summary: Shares of major health insurers, including CVS Health and UnitedHealth Group, plummeted in after-hours trading following a proposal by the Trump administration for significantly lower-than-expected Medicare Advantage payment rates for 2027. The Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) plans to increase payments by only 0.09% on average, far below analyst projections of 4% to 6% increases. This move, which also seeks to eliminate a "lucrative industry billing practice," is critical for these insurers whose core business segments rely heavily on Medicare Advantage plans.

articles.title: Susquehanna Sees CSX Refocusing on Fundamentals Under New CEO
articles.summary: Susquehanna raised its price target on CSX Corporation to $39 from $38, maintaining a Neutral rating, following the company's fourth-quarter results. Under new CEO Steve Angel, CSX is reportedly focusing on fundamental improvements like lower costs and stronger cash flow. Despite mixed Q4 results with missed revenue and profit expectations due to weaker industrial demand, the company's outlook for 200-300 basis points operating margin expansion in 2026 led to a stock increase in extended trading.

articles.title: RTX Q4 earnings on deck: What to expect
articles.summary: This article provides a brief preview of what to expect from RTX's upcoming Q4 earnings report. Investors will be looking for key financial metrics and any updates on the company's performance. The information will be released upon the announcement of earnings.

articles.title: Earnings Flash (WRB) W. R. Berkley Corporation Reports Q4 Revenue $3.72B
articles.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (WRB) has reported its Q4 revenue at $3.72 billion. The company also announced that its Q4 operating income and adjusted EPS rose to $1.13 per share, meeting FactSet estimates.

articles.title: Earnings Flash (ARE) Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Posts Q4 FFO $2.16 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $2.14
articles.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) reported its Q4 FFO at $2.16 per share, exceeding FactSet's estimate of $2.14. The company also announced Q4 revenue of $754.4 million, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $739.0 million, and provided a full-year 2026 FFO range between $6.25 and $6.55.

articles.title: Why Cisco (CSCO) Stock Is Trading Up Today
articles.summary: Cisco (CSCO) stock rose today after Evercore ISI upgraded it to Outperform and increased its price target, citing potential for "high single-digit sales and low-teens EPS growth" and up to $3 billion in AI revenues by fiscal year 2026. The analyst firm also highlighted strong demand in campus markets and an attractive valuation compared to peers. Despite a cooling from the initial jump, the stock's modest volatility suggests the market views this news as meaningful for the company.

articles.title: AI Bubble Fears Have Sharply Discounted Oracle Stock - Oracle (NYSE:ORCL)
articles.summary: Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) stock has seen a 5% decline since the beginning of the year, attributed to fears of an AI bubble implosion despite Oracle's role as a key AI enabler. This dip presents a potential discounted opportunity for contrarian investors, with current market volatility skew indicating a prioritization of downside protection. An options analysis using Black-Scholes and Markov property suggests a probable price target of $190 for ORCL stock by the Feb. 20 expiration, supporting a bullish outlook on its current weakness.

articles.title: AMD (AMD) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
articles.summary: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) fell 3.3% after Microsoft unveiled its new Maia 200 AI chip, signaling a move by major tech companies to develop in-house chip designs, which could increase competitive pressure on third-party suppliers like AMD. Despite this drop, AMD's stock has been volatile, and the market's reaction indicates the news is meaningful but not fundamentally altering for the company. The stock is up 12.2% year-to-date and, prior to this news, had received positive analyst commentary and a new board appointment, with strong demand for its server CPUs.

articles.title: Eaton's tax-free spinoff of mobility group unlocks value: BNP Paribas (ETN:NYSE)
articles.summary: BNP Paribas Equity Research senior analyst Andrew Buscaglia believes Eaton's decision to spin off its mobility group will unlock shareholder value by allowing the company to focus on higher-growth businesses. This spinoff is expected to improve Eaton's organic growth and operating margins, as the mobility unit's contribution to revenue and profit had declined and its margins trailed the core businesses. The move will create two distinct companies with clearer strategic priorities: Eaton focusing on electrical, data centers, and aerospace, and the mobility group operating as a standalone firm for vehicle-related markets.

articles.title: Best Waste Management Stocks To Research - January 26th
articles.summary: MarketBeat's stock screener identifies Waste Management (WM), GFL Environmental (GFL), and Custom Truck One Source (CTOS) as top waste management stocks based on recent trading volume. Waste management stocks are characterized by long-term contracts, regulatory factors, and a focus on sustainability, making them defensive, income-generating plays. WM is a large North American environmental services provider with collection, transfer stations, and landfills that produce renewable natural gas, while GFL offers comprehensive non-hazardous waste management and soil remediation, and CTOS provides specialty equipment to support the waste management industry.

articles.title: U Power stock soars after launching tokenized assets on BNB Chain
articles.summary: U Power Limited's stock surged 10.8% after announcing the launch of regulatory-compliant tokenized real-world assets on the BNB Chain, in collaboration with PicWe. This initiative aims to digitize real-world energy assets, starting with battery-swapping stations in Southern Europe, and leveraging U Power's UOTTA™ modular technology. The company plans to expand this tokenization to existing markets in Southeast Asia, Hong Kong SAR, and South America, and believes it will enhance the efficiency and scalability of energy systems.

articles.title: Scotiabank Raises Price Target for Newmont (NEM) to $152 | NEM S
articles.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its 'Sector Outperform' rating for Newmont (NEM) and significantly raised its price target from $114.00 to $152.00, marking a 33.33% increase. This decision reflects analyst Tanya Jakusconek's continued confidence in the stock. The article highlights other recent analyst upgrades for Newmont and provides an overview of the company, which is the world's largest gold miner.

articles.title: OR Royalties (OR): Scotiabank Maintains Rating, Raises Price Target
articles.summary: Scotiabank has maintained its 'Sector Perform' rating for OR Royalties (OR) and increased its price target from $41.00 to $51.00. This adjustment reflects a 24.39% raise, despite aggregated analyst forecasts suggesting a potential downside from the current price. OR Royalties, which acquires and manages precious metal royalties and streams, has seen several analyst rating and price target changes in recent months.

articles.title: BlackRock files for new bitcoin ETF with covered-call strategy
articles.summary: BlackRock has filed an S-1 registration statement with the SEC for a new exchange-traded fund (ETF) called the BlackRock Bitcoin and Ethereum Reference Price Covered Call ETF. This actively managed fund aims to provide investors with income and exposure to crypto, similar to its existing covered-call ETFs for other asset classes. The strategy involves writing covered call and cash-secured put options on the underlying crypto assets to generate income.

articles.title: Does Ventas’ EPS Surge And Uptrend Signal A Stronger Long-Term Thesis For VTR?
articles.summary: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) has shown rapid earnings per share expansion, steady revenue growth, and rising free cash flow, consistently beating analyst expectations. This performance, along with a confirmed upward stock trend and tight consolidation, suggests growing investor confidence in the company's long-term prospects. However, the article highlights inherent risks related to valuation, dividend coverage, and sensitivity to future growth disappointments, emphasizing the need for investors to consider various viewpoints.

articles.title: Precision Drilling (TSE:PD) Price Target Raised to C$118.00 at TD Securities
articles.summary: TD Securities has increased its price target for Precision Drilling (TSE:PD) from C$80.00 to C$118.00, suggesting a potential upside of 10.89% from its previous closing price. This adjustment is part of a broader trend, with several other analysts also raising their targets, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of C$116.86. Shares of Precision Drilling were trading near their 12-month high at C$106.41, reflecting positive market momentum for the North American oil and gas services provider.

articles.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
articles.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $2,665,000 in Review Notes linked to the performance of the S&P 500 Index, Nasdaq-100 Index, and the State Street SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF, with JPMorgan Chase & Co. fully and unconditionally guaranteeing the payments. These structured investments are designed for investors seeking an early exit at a premium if specific market conditions are met, but they carry significant risks including potential loss of principal and credit risk associated with the issuer and guarantor. The offering outlines key terms, hypothetical payout scenarios, and various risk considerations, including those related to market volatility and limited liquidity.

articles.title: Micron Technology Shares Drop Amid Competitive Pressure
articles.summary: Micron Technology shares dropped 1.99% following reports of Samsung nearing Nvidia certification for its HBM4 AI memory chips, increasing competitive pressure. Despite this, analysts maintain a positive outlook for Micron, rating it a "Strong Buy" due to strong growth, profitability, and momentum, anticipating a "super-upcycle" driven by AI demand and plans for significant CapEx expansion. While there's a projected 1-year price target fall according to Wall Street analysts, their current ratings largely remain positive with several recent upgrades and initiations.

articles.title: It Might Be Time to Stream This Netflix ETF
articles.summary: The article discusses the Direxion Daily NFLX Bull 2X Shares (NFXL) ETF, suggesting it could present an opportunity if Netflix's stock (NFLX) rebounds. This potential rebound hinges on Netflix successfully integrating its acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery assets and demonstrating strong international subscriber growth and better-than-expected cash flow in 2026. The NFXL ETF aims to deliver 200% of Netflix's daily performance.

articles.title: Plug Power Stock Is Sliding Monday: What's Going On?
articles.summary: Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) shares declined on Monday, despite the company's recent announcement of completing 100 MW of PEM GenEco electrolyzer installations at Galp's Sines Refinery in Europe. This project aims to produce 15,000 tons of renewable hydrogen annually, reducing the refinery's emissions. Analysts' ratings for PLUG are mixed, with a "Hold" consensus and an average price target of $2.38.

articles.title: Jefferies Financial Group Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) Stock
articles.summary: Jefferies Financial Group raised its price target for Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) from $42 to $45, maintaining a "hold" rating and implying a 6.9% upside. This follows similar price target increases from other brokerages, though the consensus rating for LUV remains "Hold" with an average price target of $42.37. The stock recently traded at $42.09, with a market cap of $21.77 billion and a P/E ratio of 64.55.

articles.title: F5 Faces Class Action Lawsuit Over Cybersecurity Incident
articles.summary: F5 (FFIV) is facing a class-action lawsuit following a significant cybersecurity incident discovered in August 2025, which led to a substantial drop in stock price and a lowered revenue growth forecast for 2026. Hagens Berman is investigating the company's disclosure timing amidst investor concerns regarding transparency. The lawsuit's lead plaintiff deadline is February 17, 2026, offering legal recourse for investors who purchased F5 securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, to seek legal remedies.

articles.title: Takeda Pharmaceutical (NYSE:TAK) Sets New 52-Week High - What's Next?
articles.summary: Takeda Pharmaceutical (NYSE:TAK) recently hit a new 52-week high of $16.58, trading above its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. While Morgan Stanley initiated an "overweight" rating, the consensus among analysts remains a "Hold." The company reported Q3 earnings that met EPS estimates but missed revenue expectations, and it has issued FY2025 EPS guidance of 3.25.

articles.title: (IVAL) and the Role of Price-Sensitive Allocations
articles.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of Alpha Architect International Quantitative Value Etf (NASDAQ: IVAL), highlighting strong sentiment across all horizons and an ongoing breakout. It details three distinct AI-generated trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—tailored for different risk profiles. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal analysis, real-time entry and exit signals, and risk-reward ratios to assist institutional and individual investors.

articles.title: Spotify stock price today: SPOT steadies near $513 as investors eye Feb. 10 results
articles.summary: Spotify shares are holding steady near $513 as investors anticipate the company's Q4 earnings report on February 10 and the upcoming U.S. Premium price hike. A recent "Buy" upgrade from Goldman Sachs, despite a lowered price target, and the potential impact of the price hike on gross margins are key factors. The company faces competitive pressures and risks related to churn rates and the advertising market, influencing its growth stock valuation.

articles.title: Western Digital stock price climbs after Cantor lifts target to $300, with WDC earnings next
articles.summary: Western Digital shares rose after Cantor Fitzgerald increased its price target to $300 from $250, maintaining an "overweight" rating. Investors are looking ahead to Western Digital's earnings report on January 29th, focusing on demand from AI data centers and potential pricing shifts. The stock has seen a significant surge recently, and the upcoming earnings call is viewed as a critical event that could either confirm the rally or cause a pullback.

articles.title: 3i Group (LON:III) Stock Rating Lowered by Royal Bank Of Canada
articles.summary: Royal Bank Of Canada has downgraded 3i Group (LON:III) to an "underperform" rating, setting a new price target of GBX 3,000, which indicates a potential downside of 4.12%. Several other analysts have maintained "buy" or "overweight" ratings with higher price objectives. The stock recently traded down by 4.7%, and insider transactions show recent share purchases by company executives.

articles.title: UPS Q4 Earnings Preview: Market Expert Says 'Things Appear To Be Turning Around'
articles.summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) is set to release its fourth-quarter earnings, with analysts expecting a decline in EPS and revenue but noting the company's strong track record of beating EPS estimates. A market expert from Freedom Capital suggests that UPS, despite being a laggard in 2025, shows signs of turning around in 2026, with its stock breaking above its 200-day moving average. The report will likely face higher expectations following strong recent results from competitor FedEx, with investors keen to see year-over-year growth, strong segment results, and positive guidance for the next fiscal year.

articles.title: Waste Management Rose 4% Last Week. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise in 2026
articles.summary: Waste Management, Inc. (WM) stock rose 4% last week, fueled by anticipation for its upcoming earnings report and positive analyst commentary. A valuation model suggests a target price of $283, indicating a 23.5% upside over the next 1.9 years, primarily driven by sustained price-driven revenue growth, margin improvements, and efficient capital allocation. The stock appears fairly valued currently, with future returns expected from consistent earnings growth rather than a valuation re-rating.

articles.title: Live Nation: Lawsuit Uncertainty And Lofty Valuations Make Me Pass On It (NYSE:LYV)
articles.summary: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (LYV) is deemed overvalued with high forward P/E ratios extending into 2030, despite normalized post-pandemic demand. The company faces profitability constraints due to high operating expenses and tight margins, with little near-term improvement expected. Furthermore, ongoing DOJ antitrust lawsuits introduce significant legal uncertainty, contributing to share price volatility and clouding the investment outlook.

articles.title: A Look At Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) Valuation After New MTA Order And Frauscher Acquisition
articles.summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) is gaining investor attention following a US$386 million order from New York's MTA and the acquisition of Frauscher Sensor Technology Group. Despite a recent share price surge, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests WAB is still undervalued, with a fair value of $240.25 against its current trading price of $230.11. However, potential risks include softer North American railcar demand and a reliance on acquisitions.

articles.title: Traws Pharma stock soars after completing COVID-19 treatment study By Investing.com
articles.summary: Traws Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ:TRAW) stock surged 14.5% after completing enrollment for its Phase 2 study of ratutrelvir, an oral COVID-19 treatment. The company suggests ratutrelvir may offer advantages over Pfizer's PAXLOVID, including fewer adverse events and faster symptom resolution, while also updating on its influenza treatment candidate, tivoxavir marboxil.

articles.title: Beyond The Numbers: 6 Analysts Discuss Standex International Stock
articles.summary: Six analysts have recently evaluated Standex International (NYSE: SXI), maintaining an average price target of $262.0, an increase of 3.63% from the previous average. The company shows strong revenue growth of 27.55% and impressive net margin, ROE, and ROA compared to industry averages, though its debt-to-equity ratio is higher. These insights provide a comprehensive look at the company's financial health and market perception.

articles.title: RLI Q4 Deep Dive: Margin Expansion Amid Heightened Competition and Market Shifts
articles.summary: RLI (NYSE: RLI) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, meeting revenue expectations with a 2.8% year-on-year increase and beating EPS estimates by 17.1%. Despite competitive pressures and tepid top-line growth, the company achieved significant margin expansion, driven by disciplined underwriting, minimal storm activity, and increased investment income. RLI plans to continue focusing on rate increases in personal umbrella and transportation lines, alongside investments in operational efficiency and technology to navigate market challenges and maintain profitability.

articles.title: 3 Gold Dividend Stocks For Record Gold Prices
articles.summary: The article discusses three gold dividend stocks that investors can consider as a hedge against inflation, especially with gold prices hitting record highs above $5,000 per ounce. It highlights Franco-Nevada Corp. (FNV), Royal Gold Inc. (RGLD), and Fortitude Gold (FTCO), providing details on their business models, recent financial performance, and dividend yields, ranging from 0.6% to 2.1%. The piece suggests that owning gold stocks is a way to gain exposure to rising gold prices while also generating dividend income.

articles.title: Teradyne Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
articles.summary: Teradyne announced a cash dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. This decision reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders, alongside its operations in automated test equipment and advanced robotics. Analyst forecasts suggest a potential price fall for TER stock over the next 12 months, with an average 1-year price target of $206.12.

articles.title: Teradyne Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.12 per Share, Payable March 13 to Holders of Record Feb. 13
articles.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.12 per share. This dividend is payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. The announcement was made on January 26, 2026, and follows recent analyst adjustments to the company's price target.

articles.title: NRG Energy Secures Antitrust Clearance for Acquisition
articles.summary: NRG Energy has received antitrust clearance from the DOJ for its acquisition of 18 natural gas generation facilities and a virtual power plant platform, completing all necessary regulatory approvals. This acquisition will add 13 GW of quick-start natural gas generation and 6 GW of virtual power plant capability, significantly enhancing NRG's competitive position in the Northeast and Texas markets and expanding its customer service. Wall Street analysts predict a rise in NRG's stock price, with an average 1-year target of $200.75, citing strong free cash flow and diverse growth drivers.

articles.title: Truist Financial Maintains KeyCorp(KEY.US) With Hold Rating, Announces Target Price $23
articles.summary: Truist Financial has maintained a Hold rating on KeyCorp (KEY.US), setting a target price of $23. Analyst Brian Foran, according to TipRanks data, has an 88.5% success rate and a 15.1% average return over the past year. TipRanks provides independent analysis of financial analysts' recommendations, including success rates and average returns.

articles.title: Chevron ramps up Venezuelan oil shipments as US tightens control
articles.summary: Chevron has significantly increased its Venezuelan crude shipments, assembling its largest shipping fleet in almost a year. This uptick follows US policy changes that have reshaped Venezuela's oil flows, specifically after efforts to clamp down on illicit oil trading. Chevron's authorized exports, primarily destined for US refiners, indicate a shift towards legitimate channels for Venezuelan oil in global markets.

articles.title: Will Expeditors International (EXPD) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
articles.summary: Expeditors International (EXPD) is projected to beat its next earnings estimates, continuing a trend of solid earnings surprises. The company boasts a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.34% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating a high probability of exceeding expectations. Its next earnings report is anticipated on February 24, 2026.

articles.title: Arista Networks Upgraded Amid Rising Investment Trends
articles.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) has received an upgrade from Neutral to Overweight by Piper Sandler, with a price target increase to $159, leading to a 5.9% rise in its stock. The optimism stems from anticipated enterprise investments in hyperscaler and AI sectors, referred to as a "Year of Refresh." The company's strong financial performance in Q3 2025, including $2.308B in revenue and an operating margin of 47%, further supports investor confidence ahead of its Q4 2025 financial results announcement on February 12, 2026.

articles.title: UK banks commit to $15 billion lending package to help firms expand abroad
articles.summary: Britain's five largest banks, including NatWest, HSBC, Barclays, Lloyds, and Santander, have pledged a combined £11 billion ($15 billion) to support UK firms expanding into international markets. This initiative, backed by government guarantees through UK Export Finance, aims to boost economic growth and comes after the Bank of England encouraged increased lending by commercial banks.

articles.title: Sysco (SYY) Set to Announce Q2 Earnings with Positive Expectatio
articles.summary: Sysco (SYY) is expected to announce its Q2 earnings on January 27th, with analysts predicting a 5.4% year-over-year EPS increase and $20.78 billion in revenue. The company, the largest U.S. foodservice distributor, exhibits strong financial stability with an Altman Z-Score of 5.04. While maintaining steady revenue growth and profitability, investors are advised to consider its high debt-to-equity ratio despite a neutral market outlook.

articles.title: UP Fintech (TIGR) Experiences Surge in Bullish Options Activity
articles.summary: UP Fintech (TIGR) has seen a significant increase in bullish options activity, with 20,774 call options traded and implied volatility rising to 55.28%. The Put/Call Ratio of 0.04 indicates strong bullish sentiment as investors anticipate the company's upcoming earnings report. Despite robust financial health, an Altman Z-Score of 0.38 suggests potential financial instability warranting careful consideration by investors.

articles.title: A Look At Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
articles.summary: Charles River Laboratories International (CRL) has seen recent share price momentum with a 30-day return of 7.83% and a 90-day gain of 16.86%, attracting investor attention. While Simply Wall St's fair value estimate of $188.93 suggests the stock is currently overvalued at its closing price of $219.61, indicating a 16.2% overvaluation, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests a higher future cash flow value of $272.80. The article encourages investors to analyze the underlying factors, risks, and different valuation perspectives to make informed decisions.

articles.title: Intel, Oracle among market cap stock movers on Monday
articles.summary: On Monday, the stock market saw significant movement among various companies. While Oracle and Cisco experienced rallies, Intel's stock declined. The article highlights major stock movers across mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap categories based on news and other market factors.

articles.title: General Electric Company: The Growth Runway Looks Longer Than The Market Thinks (NYSE:GE)
articles.summary: General Electric (GE) is rated a buy due to strong earnings and order growth in its commercial and defense sectors. The company reported double-digit revenue and EPS growth in 2023, with Q4 performing exceptionally. Despite a seemingly high forward P/E, GE is considered undervalued given its historical averages and management's projections for continued double-digit EPS growth, making it an attractive long-term investment.

articles.title: IWO vs. VONG: How Does A Small Cap Growth Compare Against A Large Cap Growth Fund
articles.summary: This article compares two growth ETFs, VONG and IWO, highlighting their differences in focus, cost, performance, and holdings. VONG tracks large-cap growth stocks, primarily in tech, while IWO focuses on small-cap growth stocks across various sectors. Investors should consider their risk tolerance and investment goals when choosing between VONG's large-cap tech concentration and IWO's small-cap diversification.

articles.title: Lekstrom Morgan Lee, director, buys Streamex Corp (STEX) shares
articles.summary: Lekstrom Morgan Lee, a director at Streamex Corp (STEX), recently purchased 41,000 shares of the company's common stock for over $128,000. This insider buying occurred as STEX shares have experienced recent volatility, though the stock has shown significant year-over-year growth. Analysts have set a price target of $12 for STEX, indicating potential for substantial upside.
